option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<AnchorPane style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.auction.client.controller.HomeController"> <children> <BorderPane AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0">
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ NAVBAR ══════════════════════════════════════════ --> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="60" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-padding: 0 24 0 24;"> <children> <!-- Logo / Brand --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 18; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 0 32 0 0;" text=" THE CURATOR" />
<!-- Nav links --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Auctions" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Categories" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Private Sales" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Search --> <TextField fx:id="searchField" onKeyPressed="#onSearchEnter" prefHeight="34" prefWidth="200" promptText=" Search lots, artists..." style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #718096; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 0 10;" />
<!-- ACC button --> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 14; -fx-font-size: 12;" text=" ACC"> <HBox.margin><Insets left="12" /></HBox.margin> </Button>
<!-- Logout — giữ nguyên onAction --> <Button fx:id="btnLogout" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" style="-fx-background-color: #e53e3e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 16; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="Đăng xuất"> <HBox.margin><Insets left="12" /></HBox.margin> </Button> </children> </HBox> </top>
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ BODY = SIDEBAR + CONTENT ══════════════════════════════════════════ --> <center> <HBox>
<!-- ── SIDEBAR — giống auctionlist-view ── --> <VBox prefWidth="210" spacing="4" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-padding: 20 12 20 12;"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #4a5568; -fx-font-size: 10; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 0 0 8 8;" text="MENU" />
<!-- Danh sách đấu giá (active tab) --> <Button fx:id="btnSideAuctions" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSideAuctionsClick" style="-fx-background-color: #4299e1; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Danh sách đấu giá" />
<!-- Đăng sản phẩm — giữ nguyên onAction onSellerDashboardClick --> <Button fx:id="btnSellerDash" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSellerDashboardClick" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="➕ Đăng sản phẩm"> <VBox.margin><Insets top="2" /></VBox.margin> </Button>
<!-- Lịch sử đấu giá --> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBidHistoryClick" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Lịch sử đấu giá"> <VBox.margin><Insets top="2" /></VBox.margin> </Button>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Divider --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #2d3748; -fx-padding: 8 0;" text="──────────────" />
<!-- User info bottom --> <Label fx:id="userLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #718096; -fx-font-size: 11; -fx-padding: 0 0 0 8;" text=" Người dùng" /> </children> </VBox>
<!-- ── CONTENT AREA ── --> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5; -fx-background: #f0f2f5;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <VBox spacing="28" style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5; -fx-padding: 28 32 40 32;"> <children>
<!-- ───────────────────────────────────── HERO CARD — "Live now" nổi bật ───────────────────────────────────── --> <HBox spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian,rgba(0,0,0,0.18),12,0,0,4);"> <children> <!-- Placeholder ảnh hero --> <StackPane prefHeight="240" prefWidth="340" style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-background-radius: 12 0 0 12;"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="240" fitWidth="340" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" /> <Label style="-fx-font-size: 48; -fx-text-fill: #4a5568;" text="" /> </children> </StackPane>
<!-- Thông tin hero --> <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding: 30 32 30 32;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Badge Live now + Lot --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #fc8181; -fx-font-size: 11; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: #742a2a; -fx-background-radius: 20; -fx-padding: 3 10;" text=" LIVE NOW" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 12;" text="Lot 001" /> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Tên sản phẩm --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="The Eames Prototype Archive" wrapText="true" />
<!-- Mô tả --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #718096; -fx-font-size: 13;" text="Description" />
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Divider --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #2d3748;" text="──────────────────────────────────────────" />
<!-- Giá + nút Place Bid --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"> <children> <VBox spacing="2"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 10; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="CURRENT BID" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #68d391; -fx-font-size: 26; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="68,68 $" /> </children> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <!-- Place Bid → detail-view (giữ nguyên) --> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onHeroBidClicked" prefHeight="44" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #4299e1; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Place Bid →" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <!-- /CURATED LOTS -->
<!-- ───────────────────────────────────── BẢNG PHIÊN ĐẤU GIÁ — style auctionlist Nút "Tham gia" → detail-view ───────────────────────────────────── --> <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 20; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian,rgba(0,0,0,0.07),8,0,0,2);"> <children> <!-- Header --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12"> <children> <Label style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #2d3748;" text="Phiên đấu giá đang diễn ra" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onRefreshAuctions" style="-fx-background-color: #edf2f7; -fx-text-fill: #4a5568; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 14;" text=" Làm mới" /> </children> </HBox>
<!-- TableView --> <TableView fx:id="auctionTable" prefHeight="260" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8;" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionName" prefWidth="260" text="Sản phẩm" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionPrice" prefWidth="140" text="Giá hiện tại" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionTime" prefWidth="130" text="Còn lại" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionStatus" prefWidth="130" text="Trạng thái" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionAction" prefWidth="120" text="Hành động" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <!-- /BẢNG PHIÊN ĐẤU GIÁ -->
</children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> <!-- /CONTENT AREA -->
</HBox> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableColumn?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TableView?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<AnchorPane style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5;" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="com.auction.client.HomeController"> <children> <BorderPane AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0">
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ NAVBAR ══════════════════════════════════════════ --> <top> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" prefHeight="60" spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-padding: 0 24 0 24;"> <children> <!-- Logo / Brand --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 18; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 0 32 0 0;" text=" THE CURATOR" />
<!-- Nav links --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Auctions" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Categories" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-padding: 0 20 0 0; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Private Sales" />
<Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Search --> <TextField fx:id="searchField" onKeyPressed="#onSearchEnter" prefHeight="34" prefWidth="200" promptText=" Search lots, artists..." style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #718096; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-border-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 0 10;" />
<!-- ACC button --> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 14; -fx-font-size: 12;" text=" ACC"> <HBox.margin><Insets left="12" /></HBox.margin> </Button>
<!-- Logout — giữ nguyên onAction --> <Button fx:id="btnLogout" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onLogoutClick" style="-fx-background-color: #e53e3e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 16; -fx-font-size: 12; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="Đăng xuất"> <HBox.margin><Insets left="12" /></HBox.margin> </Button> </children> </HBox> </top>
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ BODY = SIDEBAR + CONTENT ══════════════════════════════════════════ --> <center> <HBox>
<!-- ── SIDEBAR — giống auctionlist-view ── --> <VBox prefWidth="210" spacing="4" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-padding: 20 12 20 12;"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #4a5568; -fx-font-size: 10; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 0 0 8 8;" text="MENU" />
<!-- Danh sách đấu giá (active tab) --> <Button fx:id="btnSideAuctions" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSideAuctionsClick" style="-fx-background-color: #4299e1; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Danh sách đấu giá" />
<!-- Đăng sản phẩm — giữ nguyên onAction onSellerDashboardClick --> <Button fx:id="btnSellerDash" maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onSellerDashboardClick" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="➕ Đăng sản phẩm"> <VBox.margin><Insets top="2" /></VBox.margin> </Button>
<!-- Lịch sử đấu giá --> <Button maxWidth="Infinity" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onBidHistoryClick" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-alignment: CENTER_LEFT; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-padding: 10 14; -fx-font-size: 13; -fx-cursor: hand;" text=" Lịch sử đấu giá"> <VBox.margin><Insets top="2" /></VBox.margin> </Button>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Divider --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #2d3748; -fx-padding: 8 0;" text="──────────────" />
<!-- User info bottom --> <Label fx:id="userLabel" style="-fx-text-fill: #718096; -fx-font-size: 11; -fx-padding: 0 0 0 8;" text=" Người dùng" /> </children> </VBox>
<!-- ── CONTENT AREA ── --> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5; -fx-background: #f0f2f5;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <VBox spacing="28" style="-fx-background-color: #f0f2f5; -fx-padding: 28 32 40 32;"> <children>
<!-- ───────────────────────────────────── HERO CARD — "Live now" nổi bật ───────────────────────────────────── --> <HBox spacing="0" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f2e; -fx-background-radius: 12; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian,rgba(0,0,0,0.18),12,0,0,4);"> <children> <!-- Placeholder ảnh hero --> <StackPane prefHeight="240" prefWidth="340" style="-fx-background-color: #2d3748; -fx-background-radius: 12 0 0 12;"> <children> <ImageView fitHeight="240" fitWidth="340" pickOnBounds="true" preserveRatio="true" /> <Label style="-fx-font-size: 48; -fx-text-fill: #4a5568;" text="" /> </children> </StackPane>
<!-- Thông tin hero --> <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-padding: 30 32 30 32;" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <children> <!-- Badge Live now + Lot --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #fc8181; -fx-font-size: 11; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-color: #742a2a; -fx-background-radius: 20; -fx-padding: 3 10;" text=" LIVE NOW" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 12;" text="Lot 001" /> </children> </HBox>
<!-- Tên sản phẩm --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="The Eames Prototype Archive" wrapText="true" />
<!-- Mô tả --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #718096; -fx-font-size: 13;" text="Description" />
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" />
<!-- Divider --> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #2d3748;" text="──────────────────────────────────────────" />
<!-- Giá + nút Place Bid --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="20"> <children> <VBox spacing="2"> <children> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #a0aec0; -fx-font-size: 10; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="CURRENT BID" /> <Label style="-fx-text-fill: #68d391; -fx-font-size: 26; -fx-font-weight: bold;" text="68,68 $" /> </children> </VBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <!-- Place Bid → detail-view (giữ nguyên) --> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onHeroBidClicked" prefHeight="44" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #4299e1; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-size: 14; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-cursor: hand;" text="Place Bid →" /> </children> </HBox> </children> </VBox> </children> </HBox> <!-- /CURATED LOTS -->
<!-- ───────────────────────────────────── BẢNG PHIÊN ĐẤU GIÁ — style auctionlist Nút "Tham gia" → detail-view ───────────────────────────────────── --> <VBox spacing="12" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 20; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian,rgba(0,0,0,0.07),8,0,0,2);"> <children> <!-- Header --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12"> <children> <Label style="-fx-font-size: 16; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #2d3748;" text="Phiên đấu giá đang diễn ra" /> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onRefreshAuctions" style="-fx-background-color: #edf2f7; -fx-text-fill: #4a5568; -fx-background-radius: 6; -fx-cursor: hand; -fx-padding: 6 14;" text=" Làm mới" /> </children> </HBox>
<!-- TableView --> <TableView fx:id="auctionTable" prefHeight="260" style="-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8;" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionName" prefWidth="260" text="Sản phẩm" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionPrice" prefWidth="140" text="Giá hiện tại" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionTime" prefWidth="130" text="Còn lại" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionStatus" prefWidth="130" text="Trạng thái" /> <TableColumn fx:id="colAuctionAction" prefWidth="120" text="Hành động" /> </columns> </TableView> </children> </VBox> <!-- /BẢNG PHIÊN ĐẤU GIÁ -->
</children> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> <!-- /CONTENT AREA -->
</HBox> </center>
</BorderPane> </children> </AnchorPane>
